title: Create: The Factory Must Backport
description: Compatibility mod for Vanilla Backport x Create: The Factory Must Grow!
body:
**Compatibility mod for Vanilla Backport x Create: The Factory Must Grow!**

REQUIRES VANILLA BACKPORT, CREATE & CREATE: THE FACTORY MUST GROW

Features:

- Makes Vanilla Backport Sulfur work with Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Integrates Backported Content with Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Sulfur crushing recipe
- Sulfur crafting recipe
